creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: It is hard to guess something without seeing the system.  I'd start from looking on the SSD usage and latency with `gstat -I 1s -pod` and may be CPU usage in `top -SHIz`.  Also according to ".eli" in the device name, I suppose it is encrypted.  So I'd try it without encryption for comparison or checked that you have it accelerated.
